phone_presence_notes: Polite and recovered well from the customer mix-up, but never used Francesca's name and warmth was inconsistent throughout.
top_strength: Excellent customer history retrieval — proactively identified pad deposit from prior move and handled it smoothly.
coaching_note: Pricing differentiators thin on booking call — Meet Your Mover, On-Time Guarantee, no-hidden-fees pitch reduce cancellation risk even on minimum moves.
